name: Fried Bruschetta
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
Chopped fresh fennel or slivers of roasted red peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat some olive oil in a skillet.
2. Fry the bread with the garlic until toasted.
3. Spread the fried bread with puréed beans.
4. Season with salt and pepper.
5. Drizzle with more olive oil.
6. Garnish with chopped fresh fennel or slivers of roasted red peppers.
Yield: 2 servings
